stories.title: Did both the Browns and Rams win the Myles Garrett...
stories.summary: How all-in are the Rams? What changed for Cleveland? Answering seven questions and grading the Garrett and Jared Verse trade.

stories.title: Grading the Garrett trade: Did the Rams give up to...
stories.summary: How did the Rams and Browns each fare in the big Myles Garrett-Jared Verse deal? We hand out trade grades.

stories.title: Sources: Garrett traded to Rams in blockbuster
stories.summary: The Browns have agreed to trade Myles Garrett to the Rams for Jared Verse and multiple draft picks, including a 2027 first-rounder, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Back in Blue: Giants sign OBJ to boost WR room
stories.summary: The New York Giants have signed wide receiver Odell Beckham Jr., the team announced Monday.

stories.title: Serena making comeback to professional tennis
stories.summary: Serena Williams, 44, is making her comeback to pro tennis after nearly four years as she is scheduled to play doubles next week at the HSBC Championships in London.
